parameters.prompt:
=Generate a dense vector embedding for the following text chunk. Return only the embedding vector as a JSON array of numbers.

Text to embed:
{{ $json.content }}

Return format: [0.1, -0.2, 0.3, ...]

parameters.query:
=// Create document node
CREATE (d:Document {
  id: $document_id,
  title: $title,
  source_type: $source_type,
  source_url: $source_url,
  content_length: $content_length,
  chunk_count: $chunk_count,
  created_at: datetime(),
  metadata: $metadata
})
RETURN d.id as document_id
